zh.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons是John de Châlon Count of Chalon和Mathilde de Bourgogne的兒子，於1220年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o。他和Marguerite DE MILLY至少有1個兒子。他去世於1266年11月12日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o蒙迪-利斯-黑利額。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons是John de Châlon Count of Chalon和Mathilde de Bourgogne的儿子，于1220年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易哈隆-素-薩o。他和Marguerite DE MILLY至少有1个儿子。他去世于1266年11月12日在他的家乡享年46岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾豪-薩o蒙迪-利斯-黑利額。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hughes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

en.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons was born in 1220, in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France as the son of John de Châlon Count of Chalon and Mathilde de Bourgogne. He had at least 1 son with Marguerite DE MILLY. He died on 12 November 1266, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons est né en 1220, à Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, fils de John de Châlon Count of Chalon et Mathilde de Bourgogne. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Marguerite DE MILLY. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1266, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons wurde 1220 in Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich, als Sohn von John de Châlon Count of Chalon und Mathilde de Bourgogne geboren. Er hatte mit Marguerite DE MILLY mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 12. November 1266 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons è nato il nel 1220 nel Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia come figlio di John de Châlon Count of Chalon e Mathilde de Bourgogne. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Marguerite DE MILLY. Morì il 12 novembre 1266, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalonsは1220年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチャロン-スル-サoンでJohn de Châlon Count of ChalonとMathilde de Bourgogneの息子として生まれた。彼はMarguerite DE MILLYとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1266年11月12日に故郷で46歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeハウテ-サoンモンティグニー-ルeス-チェルリーウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons(은)는 1220년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 차론-수-사o니에서 John de Châlon Count of Chalon(와)과 Mathilde de Bourgogne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Marguerite DE MILLY(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1266년 11월 12일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 하테-사o니 몽익니-e스-체를리외에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons nasceu em 1220, em Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França filho de John de Châlon Count of Chalon e Mathilde de Bourgogne. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Marguerite DE MILLY. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1266, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons родился в 1220 г. в местности халон-сур-саoн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция. Его родителей звали John de Châlon Count of Chalon и Mathilde de Bourgogne. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Marguerite DE MILLY. Он умер 12 ноября 1266 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности монтигни-лeс-чирлиеу, хауте-саoн, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Hughes de Chalons nació en 1220, en Chalon-sur-Saône, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia como hijo de John de Châlon Count of Chalon y Mathilde de Bourgogne. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Marguerite DE MILLY. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1266, en su pueblo, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Montigny-lès-Cherlieu, Haute-Saône, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
